chats.text: Hey, I'm bringing cakes! They're €12 each and I need 4. That's €48 right? 🎂
I'm driving from Leiden, about 25 min. If I leave at 5:35 will I make it by 6? 🚗
chats.feedback_incorrect: Hmm 5:35 + 25 min = 6:00, should be fine actually!

chats.text: Should I bring red or white wine? What are you cooking? 🍷
chats.feedback_incorrect: Hmm but steak pairs with red though! I'll bring red 🍷

chats.text: Can I park on your street or do I need a permit after 6? 🅿️
chats.wrong_choice: You need a permit all day
chats.feedback_incorrect: Oh wait, I think evenings are free actually! I'll check the sign 🅿️

chats.text: Hey! How many people tonight? I want to know how much salad to make 🥗
chats.feedback_incorrect: Hmm I thought more people were coming? I'll make extra just in case 🥗

chats.text: I split the cake cost with Emma — €48 ÷ 2 = €24 each, right?
Just saw there's construction on the A4. Should I take the A44 instead? Is that faster from Leiden? 🛣️
chats.correct_choice: Stick with A4, construction is minor
chats.feedback_correct: Yeah you're right, A4 should be fine at this hour 🛣️
chats.feedback_incorrect: Actually the A4 is probably okay at this time, I'll risk it 🛣️

chats.text: Is it true that the Netherlands has more bikes than people? 🚲 I got into an argument about it
chats.feedback_correct: Ha! I knew it! Sending this to my colleague right now 🚲
chats.feedback_incorrect: I just googled it — it IS true! About 23 million bikes for 17 million people 🚲

chats.text: Quick math — if dinner's at 6 and it's 5:40 now, how many minutes do we have? ⏰
Do you have enough plates for everyone? I can bring some paper ones just in case 🍽️
chats.feedback_correct: Okay cool, one less thing to worry about! 🍽️
chats.feedback_incorrect: Alright I'll grab some on the way! 🍽️

chats.text: Tom says Canberra is the capital of Australia but I keep thinking it's Sydney 😅
chats.feedback_incorrect: I just checked — it IS Canberra! Tom was right 😭

chats.text: Almost there! Should I ring the doorbell or just come in? 🚪
chats.feedback_incorrect: Okay I'll ring then, see you in a sec! 🚪

notifications.text: Tonight: 14°C, clear skies. Perfect for a dinner party!
Your package is out for delivery
